result.stdout:
Description:
  Sample app for System.CommandLine

Usage:
  CLI [options]

Options:
  -t, --template <template>    Template file path and name
  -f, --file <file>            First file path
  -r, --recursive <recursive>  Second file path
  -a, --all <all>              Second file path
  --version                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
